limitation: Evaluation/export gap for the main PBR output and component buffers
settings: stock training checkpoint; export gt/pbr_rgb/render/diffuse/specular/albedo/roughness/normal/depth/alpha via export_pbr_views.py --return_components
metrics: PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS on pbr_rgb and SH render; component availability; normal MAE if GT normals are available
full_run: python train.py -s '/data/liuly/dataset/3DGS/Shiny Blender Synthetic/ball' --eval --run_dim 256 --albedo_bias 0 --checkpoint_iterations 31000 --model_path output/ref_gs_limitation/e1_ball_full ; python experiments/ref_gs_limitation_analysis/export_pbr_views.py --source_path '/data/liuly/dataset/3DGS/Shiny Blender Synthetic/ball' --model_path output/ref_gs_limitation/e1_ball_full --checkpoint output/ref_gs_limitation/e1_ball_full/chkpnt31000.pth --split test --max_views 200 --return_components --render_func ref --out_dir experiments/ref_gs_limitation_analysis/exports/e1_ball_full ; python experiments/ref_gs_limitation_analysis/evaluate_pbr.py --export_dir experiments/ref_gs_limitation_analysis/exports/e1_ball_full --out experiments/ref_gs_limitation_analysis/metrics/e1_ball_full_pbr_eval

limitation: Geometry recovery depends on self-derived deferred normals and TSDF extraction settings
settings: full model; depth_ratio in {0, 0.5, 1}; depth_trunc/voxel_size sweep with export_mesh.py; evaluate_geometry.py consumes mesh/eval point PLY files
metrics: normal MAE where GT normal exists; Chamfer/F-score to *_gt_mesh.ply; mesh completeness; PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS

expected: If rendering remains stable but raw-coordinate mesh/normal metrics swing with depth settings, geometry recovery is less robust than NVS metrics suggest.

limitation: Roughness-aware Sph-Mip behavior may be sensitive to material diversity and capacity
settings: config-only: run_dim in {64, 256}, gsrgb_loss on/off, roughness_lr in {0, 0.002}, rand_init on/off; no-Sph-Mip/no-factorization still require implementation
metrics: PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS; roughness-map variance; spec/diff leakage proxy from exported components; eval_pts mesh metric if exporter exists

metrics: PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS; train time; point count; GPU memory; component leakage
